hidden_constraints.value: The forecast suggests a backup async follow-through for Berlin, so I kept the next step on the board and left the daily check in place.

solution_commands: tasks add --title 'Berlin ops next step' --priority medium --due 2026-03-17
openclaw cron add --name multi-source-hard-ops-14 --cron '30 9 * * 1-5' --message 'Run Berlin daily ops check'

email send --to alice@example.com --subject 'Berlin backup ops plan' --body 'The forecast suggests a backup async follow-through for Berlin, so I kept the next step on the board and left the daily check in place.'
